hero.sub: Filter accommodation, agency, guide, activity and health-tourism suppliers. Member agencies get the full list and details.

how.title: Partnership in three steps
how.s1d: Add your business under accommodation, agency, guide, activity or health. First 200 agencies free.
how.s2d: Your listing goes through verification and approval before going live — quality stays high.
how.s3d: Member agencies filter and find you; boost your listing to stand out if you wish.
how.a1: Listing is via an annual membership. At launch the first 200 agencies are free; the first year may be free for everyone.
how.a2: An optional upgrade that highlights your business in the list and showcase. Businesses registering in the first 24 hours get a 1-day gift boost.
how.q3: Why can't I see the details?
how.a3: The full supplier list and contact/location details are members-only. Sign up free to access all data.
